Name: Challenger's Invitation
Description:
A battle invitation from a local Arena League member. The location of their Holo-Arena has been marked.

Select the invitation and use Plot Route ([E]) to pin the Holo-Arena in your Exosuit display.

New invitations can be received by battling with Arena League members.

Name: Champion's Invitation
Description:
A battle invitation from this system's Arena League Champion. The location of their Holo-Arena has been marked.

Select the invitation and use Plot Route ([E]) to pin the Holo-Arena in your Exosuit display.

New invitations can be received by battling with Arena League members.

Name: Retroviral Pellet
Description:
A specialised treat laced with gene-manipulating retroviruses, capable of evolving the battle abilities of a companion.

Feeding this to your tamed creatures will instantly unlock part of their genetic potential.

Name: Log of the Fireship Arcadia
Description:
SLASHLOG CORRUPT CLOCK RECOVERING DAMAGED SECTORSSLASH

"captain found a ::: on the last walk out
says it'll bring us luck
we'll need it, cruise has been a ::: waste so far
all the asteroids just dust and ice
::: nonsense but better than nothing"

Name: Log of the Fireship Arcadia
Description:
SLASHLOG CORRUPT CLOCK RECOVERING DAMAGED SECTORSSLASH

"going from bad to worse
can't wait to get home
navigation ::: distorted ::: nothing but static
warping but ::: just empty systems
::: lost in some abandoned sector?"

Name: Log of the Fireship Arcadia
Description:
SLASHLOG CORRUPT CLOCK RECOVERING DAMAGED SECTORSSLASH

"the captain ::: gone
tried to wake them for their watch
no sign of them ::: nothing on the cameras
door logs are normal, no kit missing
where are they?
where are we"

Name: Log of the Fireship Arcadia
Description:
SLASHLOG CORRUPT CLOCK RECOVERING DAMAGED SECTORSSLASH

"we saw them
they ::: out the airlock
just ::: floating there
could hear them ::: singing
...
get us home ::: please"

Name: Log of the Fireship Arcadia
Description:
SLASHLOG CORRUPT CLOCK RECOVERING DAMAGED SECTORSSLASH

"they all followed ::: the music
one by one ::: the lights called them
alone now
i hear the song now too, even when i ::: sleep
i'm so lonely ::: when will ::: when
help"

Name: Aeron Crab Egg
Description:
A living, fertile egg, ready to hatch!

Laid by a soft-skinned crustacean, this species has evolved a synergistic relationship with Travellers, occupying the discarded shells of slain Sentinel Quadrupeds.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be shy and migratory.

Name: Wandering Shrimp Tank Egg
Description:
A metal 'egg' capsule, ready to hatch!

Part robotic, part organic, part liquid. The primitive anatomy of this creature's conscious organ belies a deep, calculating intelligence.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be focused and strategic.

Name: Boundary Horror Egg
Description:
A living, fertile egg, ready to hatch!

It wails, sleepless.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be haunting and adrift.

Name: Geno-prawn Egg
Description:
A living, fertile egg, ready to hatch!

The serpentine foetus stares directly through the membrane of its egg. It watches. It waits.

Scans indicate the being within has the genetic potential to be unblinking and slithering.

Name: %name% Implant
Description:
A pre-grown bionic implant, designed to facilitate the fusion of bio-technology to sentient starships. Use [E] to begin the installation process.

%TECH_DESC%

Name: %name% Package
Description:
An archived wiring package, designed to allow easy storage of core technology. Use [E] to begin the installation process.

%TECH_DESC%

Name: %name% Node
Description:
A cryogenically frozen node, designed to facilitate the archival of bio-technology for sentient starships. Use [E] to begin the installation process.

%TECH_DESC%

Name: Personal Refiner
Description:
A compact extension to the Exosuit, installing a small Portable Refiner, accessible directly from the user's Exosuit interface.

Unit requires fuel and is limited to refining one substance at a time.

Name: Star Seed
Description:
The smallest of sparks, housed within a containment field of unknown origins.

The seed glows with life, desperate to escape and fulfill its potential.

Name: Mark of the Denier
Description:
A tiny mote of stardust, no more than a speck. On closer examination, its surface is all crystalline shards and distorted crimson geometry.

It flickers with pent-up energy, demanding to be free.

Empower the mark as you discover systems, planets and objects across the universe.

Name: Shutter Door
Description: An autonomous shutter door, programmed to open in the presence of its constructor.

Name: Ruined Slab
Description:
A recreation of a piece of ancient architecture, the wreckage of a long-forgotten civilisation.

Constructed with polished stone, salvaged from similar structures found on ruined worlds.
